top_items.title: Introducing multi-cluster GKE Inference Gateway: Scale AI workloads around the world
top_items.one_liner: Preview of multi-cluster GKE Inference Gateway to scale AI/ML inference workloads across regions.

top_items.title: BigQuery Studio is more useful than ever, with enhanced Gemini assistant
top_items.one_liner: BigQuery Studio now features an enhanced Gemini assistant to streamline data analytics tasks.

top_items.title: Gemini in Chrome expands to more countries and languages, including Canada, New Zealand, and India
top_items.one_liner: Gemini in Chrome expands to new countries and languages, emphasizing enterprise data governance.
